propositions: The real run_git wrapper is only characterized indirectly through monkeypatched callers, so its own branches are never exercised directly.
Calling run_git with input_data as bytes while text=True (default) raises an opaque AttributeError from deep inside subprocess despite the signature advertising str | bytes.
run_git should raise a clear TypeError explaining that binary stdin requires text=False instead of the opaque stdlib error.
A new direct contract test matrix should invoke the real run_git against a throwaway git repo covering cwd/-C, check, timeout, env replacement, and str stdin forwarding.
The env argument should fully replace the environment so parent vars absent from env are not visible to git.
The narrowed input_data contract must be pinned by a test and the docstring updated accordingly.
